slides.title: What we'll cover
items: The two problems a feature store solves

slides.title: The two problems it solves
left: Every team recomputes the same features
right: Features computed one way in training
A different way at serving time
Model sees different inputs in prod

slides.text: A feature store is a central registry for the features used in your models — computed once, governed, reused, and looked up identically at training and inference.

slides.subtitle: reused across every model that needs it

slides.title: Feature tables
slides.subtitle: Just Delta tables with a primary key

slides.title: What a feature table gives you

steps.title: create_table
steps.description: Register a Delta feature table with a primary key.

steps.title: create_training_set
steps.description: Declare FeatureLookups; the store joins features to labels.

steps.title: fe.log_model
steps.description: Package feature metadata INTO the model.

steps.title: fe.score_batch
steps.description: Supply keys only; features are fetched automatically.

slides.title: Build a training set by lookup — no manual joins
slides.content:
feature_lookups = [
  FeatureLookup(
    table_name='main.fs.customer_features',
    feature_names=['total_purchases_30d', 'avg_basket_size'],
    lookup_key='customer_id')
]
training_set = fe.create_training_set(
  df=labels_df, feature_lookups=feature_lookups, label='churned')

slides.text: fe.log_model packages the feature lookups WITH the model — so at inference you pass only the keys, and score_batch fetches the right features automatically.
slides.source: This is what eliminates train/serve skew

items.text: Feature table = Delta table in UC with a primary key
fe.log_model packages feature metadata with the model
fe.score_batch needs only keys — no skew
Offline & online stores share one definition

slides.title: Key takeaways
bullets: A feature store solves reuse and train/serve consistency
Feature table = governed Delta table with a primary key
Packaging features with the model kills skew
Discovery + lineage + governance make features reusable
